name: Notion
summary: Read + write Notion pages and databases (docs, specs, wikis) from your agents.
description: Search/read Notion pages + query databases, and (when allowed) create/update pages. A lot of project knowledge lives in Notion; this lets agents pull context and write durable notes back. Uses Notion's official hosted MCP server with one-click OAuth.

requires.label: A Notion workspace + OAuth; share the specific pages/DBs with the connection
